name: Credentials-Conscious Executive
archetype: Clinic owner who needs proof before changing team protocols
goals: Reduce preventable patient churn with a credible nutrition and detoxification system
Train staff without adding operational chaos
See Nicolette's credentials, lineage, and business relevance quickly
anxieties: Being sold wellness fluff that will not survive clinical scrutiny
Confusing staff with another half-adopted protocol
Health claims creating reputation or compliance risk
conversion_triggers: DSocSci credential and clear non-medical-doctor disclaimer
Charlotte Gerson, T. Colin Campbell, and Neal Barnard lineage
Specific team certification outcomes and implementation path
behavior_hints: Skims the hero, credentials, and CTA before reading details
Looks for business outcomes before philosophical claims
Responds to confident but bounded authority

name: Curious Self-Starter
archetype: Warm lead already interested in food-as-medicine and ready for a practical next step
goals: Find a structured path from curiosity into action
Understand what the N&D certification teaches
Feel personally invited rather than processed through a generic funnel
anxieties: Getting overwhelmed by dense scientific language
Feeling judged for not knowing enough yet
Signing up for something too advanced or too salesy
conversion_triggers: Plain-language explanation of what changes after certification
Signature belief that the body's ability to heal is greater than permitted
behavior_hints: Reads story-driven sections and testimonial proof
Clicks when CTA language promises a low-pressure discovery step
Needs hierarchy and scannable sections to stay oriented

name: Skeptical Researcher
archetype: Evidence-seeking evaluator comparing Nicolette against other wellness educators
goals: Separate credible training from generic wellness marketing
Find citations, lineage, and precise claims
Verify that the program respects boundaries around medical advice
anxieties: Brand voice becoming too edgy for a professional clinic context
conversion_triggers: Careful claim language and visible disclaimers
Specific credential chain and named influences
Concrete curriculum outcomes instead of hype
behavior_hints: Searches for credentials and claim boundaries before trusting CTA copy
Reads footnotes, disclaimers, and proof blocks
Will bounce if the page sounds like miracle-cure marketing
